props.name: name
props.description: Sets the identifier for the multi-select. Should be unique.

props.name: value
props.description: Sets the JSON-encoded array of selected values.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Sets the text displayed before a selection is made.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets whether the control is disabled. Defaults to `false`.

props.name: error
props.description: Sets whether to show an error state. Defaults to `false`.

props.name: filterable
props.description: Sets whether to allow the user to type to filter options. Defaults to `false`.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets the width, overriding auto-sizing. Use a CSS unit (px, %, ch, rem, em).

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width. Use a CSS unit (px, %, ch, rem, em).

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Sets the maximum height of the options menu. Defaults to `276px`.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Sets how the selected value will be translated for the screen reader.

props.name: ariaLabelledBy
props.description: Sets the aria-labelledby attribute identifying the element that labels the multi-select.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the component. Compact reduces height for dense layouts. Defaults to `default`.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.
